1. TopK(10, -count())
  2. Aggregate(count() by uri [partial])  [spill-capable]
    3. Filter(status >= 500)
      4. Scan(app)
        field_predicate: status >= 500
        columns: [_raw, _source, _time, status, uri]

Annotations:
  Optimizer rules:
    predicate-pushdown (1x)
    partial-agg (1x)
    column-pruning (1x)
